title: Innodata (INOD) Is Up After Federal AI Launch and Record Revenue - What's Shifting in Its Growth Story
text: Innodata recently announced the establishment of its new government-focused unit, marking a significant expansion into the federal AI sector. The company achieved record third-quarter revenue of US$62.6 million and committed to at least 45% year-over-year organic revenue growth in 2025. The federal division has already secured meaningful business, with an initial US$25 million project with a federal customer, demonstrating early traction in this new market segment. This diversification effort addresses a critical vulnerability the company's historical reliance on a concentrated client base of major technology firms. Investment narrative shift: While the federal expansion strengthens near-term growth prospects and leadership additions signal serious commitment, analysts caution that client concentration risk remains a primary concern for investors monitoring the stock's long-term stability and earnings sustainability.
